hero_subtitle: SFTY connects multiple KYT providers to unify wallet risk signals, route investigations, and preserve audit-ready evidence within a single compliance operating layer.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_title: KYT workflows slow with disconnected providers
problem_description: Wallet risk signals and transaction monitoring data often come from separate vendors without a unified workflow. This fragmentation creates manual handoffs, inconsistent case context, and weak audit trails that hinder efficient risk review and compliance operations for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects wallet risk signals, transaction alerts and provider outputs into unified, rule-based workflows with linked cases, audit evidence and decision logs for streamlined KYT operations at VASPs.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk alerts from multiple providers, routes them through investigation and review, and preserves case evidence for compliance reporting and audit readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond isolated wallet alerts. One KYT workflow layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple KYT provider outputs into structured reviews, case workflows, decisions and evidence to give VASP compliance teams operational control and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams with audited provider integration, traceable decision evidence and enterprise deployment for scalable, defensible KYT risk management workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence from wallet screening

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for multi-provider KYT workflows?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a provider-neutral orchestration layer that connects multiple KYT outputs into structured compliance workflows, cases, evidence and reporting for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle KYT alert orchestration?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes KYT alerts from multiple providers, applies risk rules, routes reviews, links alerts to cases and records decisions within one controlled compliance workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready KYT evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves comprehensive evidence including alert details, decision logs, case documents and provider data to support audit readiness and regulatory inspection preparation.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY can connect with existing KYT providers without replacements, consolidating their outputs into a single operational compliance layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing KYT and Travel Rule providers by turning their outputs into structured workflows rather than replacing them.
final_title: Connect KYT outputs into controlled compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects wallet risk signals, routes investigations, preserves evidence and structures operational KYT workflows for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
